mapper.insert: INSERT INTO repo_steering (repo_id, steering_id, mandatory, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{repoId}, #{steeringId}, #{mandatory}, NOW(), NOW()) ON CONFLICT (repo_id, steering_id) DO UPDATE SET mandatory = #{mandatory}, updated_at = NOW()
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM repo_steering WHERE repo_id = #{repoId} AND steering_id = #{steeringId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, repo_id, steering_id, mandatory, created_at, updated_at FROM repo_steering WHERE repo_id = #{repoId} AND steering_id = #{steeringId} LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM repo_steering WHERE repo_id = #{repoId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM repo_steering WHERE steering_id = #{steeringId}
